name: Au Gratin Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Frozen hash browns, slightly thawed OR
10 ounces Cream of chicken soup (1 can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together, except the cornflakes and cornflake crumbs.
2. Spoon the mixture into a sprayed 13-by-9-inch dish.
3. Top with cornflake crumbs.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
5. Makes 10 to 12 servings.
